description.value:
At level 1, you feel the full weight of your clan's curse coursing through your veins.
Your appearance resembles that of a humanoid rabbit, whether it's just a pair of long ears and a fluffy tail or a fully furry form. Regardless of the specifics, your features unmistakably reflect the creature you embody. While some may find your appearance adorable, it conceals a predator capable of flaying flesh from bone in an instant.
You gain the following traits:

  • Bunny Ears: Your large, sensitive ears grant you heightened hearing. You have advantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing and can clearly hear whispers from up to 60 feet away and normal speech from 120 feet as if it were spoken nearby.
  • Buck Teeth: Your powerful, razor-sharp teeth grant you a bite attack that deals 1d8 piercing damage. This attack scores a critical hit on a 19 and inflicts 1 rank of Bleeding on a critical hit.
  • Powerful Legs: Your strong legs give you exceptional speed and agility. You can high jump twice your normal distance and long jump up to your full movement speed without requiring a check. Additionally, you gain a kick attack that deals 1d8 bludgeoning damage and inflicts 1 rank of Bruised on a critical hit, you crit on a 19.
  • Adorable Looks: Like many rabbits, you appear innocent and harmless. If you have proficiency in Persuasion, you gain 1 rank of mastery in it; if not, you gain proficiency in Persuasion.
  • Horrific Nature: Beneath your cute exterior lies the heart of a relentless predator. You are immune to the Fear/Demoralized, and Curse conditions.
